parsed.explanation: Fixed encoding artifacts (e.g., '√ü' to 'ß', '√∫' to 'ü', '√†' to '†'). Corrected invalid XML structure by flattening nested <BIBL> tags and ensuring proper closure. Escaped special characters ('&' to '&'). Standardized <PRICE> tag to <PRIZE>. Corrected OCR typos in titles (e.g., 'Parabieses' to 'Paradieses', 'Poliorecticon' to 'Poliorceticon', 'Magnirudine' to 'Magnitudine').
